Process

A structured approach from diagnosis to scale

The system is built in phases to avoid automating badly defined problems.

Architecture

Diagnose

We map CRM, data, pipeline, processes, reporting, friction and commercial goals.

  • Audit

  • Priorities

Architecture

Design

We define architecture, criteria, objects, stages, automation and measurement before execution.

  • Model
  • Process
  • Metrics

Architecture

Implement

We configure structure, migrate or clean data, activate workflows and document the system.

  • CRM
  • Data
  • Automation

Architecture

Optimize

We measure the system in operation and adjust rules, conversions, reporting and input quality.

  • Performance
  • Quality
